svg.title: Personal Execution OS — full system diagram
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: data sources feed into N8N orchestration, which feeds into a Flask core with AI agent, which stores data in SQLite and a vector DB.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How would Gmail integrate into my personal OS?')
sendPrompt('How would Google Calendar feed into my personal OS?')
sendPrompt('How would Obsidian notes feed into my personal OS?')
sendPrompt('How would SMS and messages feed into my personal OS?')
sendPrompt('What other data sources could feed into my personal OS?')
sendPrompt('How does N8N ingest data from external sources?')
sendPrompt('What chunking and embedding happens in the ingestion pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What N8N workflows would automate my task management?')
sendPrompt('What REST API endpoints should my Flask app expose?')
sendPrompt('How does the agentic loop work in my Flask app?')
sendPrompt('How does the provider abstraction layer work for switching between Claude, OpenAI, Groq?')
sendPrompt('How does RAG search work inside my Flask app?')
sendPrompt('What does the Flask dashboard show me?')
sendPrompt('How does authentication work for my Flask app and API?')
sendPrompt('How does SQLite store my tasks and projects?')
sendPrompt('What vector database should I use and how does it store my personal data?')
sendPrompt('How do I access my personal OS from my browser?')
